prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-1000LADJFLSHLGHT-BLACK-FL337-10W Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Black 1000 Lumen Adjustable Beam 10W LED Camping Flashlight, 10 Inch Description: The ASR Outdoor 1000 Lumen Adjustable Beam 10W LED Camping and Survival Flashlight is packed with some seriously great features-read on.

- Adjustable light beam
- 1000 Lumen brightness
- 100% durable aluminum body construction
- 10W LED bulb
- Ergonomic knurled textures handle

Featuring a completely adjustable light beam, this flashlight gives you the flexibility to narrow or widen the beam of light by simply pulling or pushing the head of the flashlight. Whether you're camping, hiking in low light or preparing an earthquake or natural disaster kit, this adjustable beam LED flashlight is the perfect size to add to include with camping gear, a bug out bag, first aid kit or even in a utility drawer at home in case the power goes out.

Lightweight, easy to use and battery-operated, the LED flashlight is a breeze to carry, pack and travel with, and will last for many years to come, whether used at home, in the field or on outdoor adventures and excursions with family and friends.

Length: 10 inches

Batteries: x3 D Alkaline (not included) Search Terms: EDC camping gear survival kit emergency preparedness backpacking hunting fishing trekking climbing first aid travel gadgets equipment tactical flashlight LED tools prepper bug out bag supplies disaster hiking Features: - ADJUSTABLE BEAM FLASHLIGHT: The ASR Outdoor camping and survival flashlight features a unique adjustable light beam, giving you flexibility to narrow or widen the beam of light by simply pulling or pushing the head of the flashlight; the flashlight boasts a 10W LED bulb and 1000 Lumen brightness - ERGONOMIC TEXTURED GRIP: The ASR Outdoor 1000 Lumen flashlight features a knurled texturized ergonomic handle that allows you to better grasp the flashlight for excellent grip and comfort - DURABLE ALUMINUM CONSTRUCTION: Durable, low-maintenance, long-lasting and lightweight, the 100% aluminum fabrication of this flashlight makes it easy to carry, pack and travel with, and will last you through many years to come whether used at home, in the field or on outdoor adventures and excursions - ADVENTURE READY FLASHLIGHT: Whether you're camping, hiking in low light or preparing an earthquake or natural disaster kit, this adjustable beam LED flashlight is the perfect size to add to include with camping gear, a bug out bag, first aid kit or even in a utility drawer at home in case the power goes out - SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 10 inches; Color: Black; Watts: 10; Lumen: 1000; Batteries: x3 D Alkaline (not included) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10 Inch Black 1000 Lumen LED Flashlight

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10 In Black Adjustable Beam 1000 Lumen LED Flashlight

anthropic.title_differentiation: Adjustable Beam, 1000 Lumens, 10W LED, Aluminum Construction, Ergonomic Grip, Camping And Survival

openai.title_differentiation: Adjustable Beam, 1000 Lumen Brightness, 10W LED, Aluminum Body, Ergonomic Textured Grip, D Battery Operated
